common.errorDemoDesc: Click the button below to simulate an error. The error will be captured and reported.
common.errorDescription: An error occurred while loading data.
common.featureErrorsDesc: Automatic error capture and reporting in real time.
common.featureI18nDesc: Multi-language support with automatic missing translation tracking.
common.featureListsDesc: Dynamic data management using flexible lists and items.
common.heroDescription: List management, translations and error tracking in one place.
common.heroSubtitle: A toolkit for modern web development
common.interpolationResult: Hello {name}, how are you? Today is {day} and {month}.
common.packagesSubtitle: Everything you need, in one ecosystem
common.pkgCliDesc: Command-line tool for project management. Initialization, translation management and configuration right from the terminal.
common.pkgClientDesc: The main React package that brings all services together. A single import gives you translations, lists and error tracking.
common.pkgErrorKitDesc: Error tracking with React error boundary and global handlers. Automatically captures and reports exceptions to the server.
common.pkgI18nDesc: Internationalization with contextual React hooks. Multi-language support, variable interpolation and automatic missing translation reporting.
common.pkgListsDesc: React hooks for working with lists and items. Data is fetched from the API and available through simple hooks like useList and useLists.
common.pricingSubtitle: Choose a plan that suits you
common.test: Hello {name}, how are you? Today is {day} and {month}
